title: Fairness Wellbeing Commission- Older People – National Picture (Evidence Pack, April 2023)
author: Goyder, Elizabeth
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An overview of UK evidence on older people and fairness: poverty and income inequality, housing tenure effects, ethnic inequalities, low benefit uptake, social isolation, and digital exclusion, with key stats and source links
